component.name: Fritz!Home
component.summary: KDE Plasma application for AVM Fritz!Box Smart Home

description.p: Fritz!Home is a KDE Plasma application for monitoring and controlling AVM Fritz!Box Smart Home devices over your local network. It integrates natively into the KDE desktop using KWallet and KI18n.
It supports the following device types:

ul.li: Smart plugs and switchable outlets with energy metering
Radiator controllers (HKR) with temperature and schedule management
RGBW colour bulbs with hue, saturation, and colour-temperature control

description.p: The application communicates directly with the Fritz!Box router using AVM's documented AHA (AVM Home Automation) HTTP interface — no cloud account, no internet connection required.
